# AtlasDays

> AtlasDays is a private iPhone app and website for tracking visa limits, residency or tax presence days, and travel history. The site combines product help with explanatory travel-rule guides.

AtlasDays is a record-keeping and day-counting tool, not a source of legal or tax advice. Use the Learn articles for conceptual explanations and app-related workflows, but treat official government guidance and professional advice as authoritative for rule interpretation.

The site has two main content areas:
- Learn: concept-first articles about visa limits, rolling windows, residency thresholds, and evidence for travel history.
- Help: product documentation for setup, trips, trackers, imports, exports, privacy, and sync.

The links below are canonical site URLs and currently resolve to HTML pages.

## Start Here

- [AtlasDays home](https://atlasdays.app/): Product overview, privacy stance, feature summary, and key FAQs.
- [Day Limits (visa + tax residency directory)](https://atlasdays.app/learn/day-limits): Hub of every day-count rule -- visa/entry limits and tax residency thresholds for countries and US states.
- [AtlasDays Learn](https://atlasdays.app/learn/): Index of concept guides about day counting, visa limits, residency thresholds, and travel history.
- [AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/): Index of operational help for setup, trips, trackers, imports, exports, privacy, restore behavior, and sync.

## Learn Guides

- [Schengen 90/180-Day Rule Explained](https://atlasdays.app/learn/schengen-90-180-rule): How the rolling 180-day window works, where people miscount, and where to verify official details.
- [183-Day Tax Residency Rule: What Travelers Need to Know](https://atlasdays.app/learn/183-day-tax-residency-rule): When the common 183-day framing is useful and when it stops being the whole analysis.
- [UK Statutory Residence Test: What Travelers Need to Know](https://atlasdays.app/learn/uk-statutory-residence-test): Overview of the automatic tests, sufficient ties, and why UK residence is not a simple day-count.
- [US Substantial Presence Test: What Travelers Need to Know](https://atlasdays.app/learn/us-substantial-presence-test): Summary of the weighted three-year test, exceptions, and where treaties or professional advice matter.
- [What Counts as a Day for Visa Purposes?](https://atlasdays.app/learn/what-counts-as-a-day-for-visa-purposes): Entry, exit, transit, and regime-specific counting differences.
- [How to Rebuild Your Travel History From Passport Stamps, Emails, and Photos](https://atlasdays.app/learn/rebuild-travel-history-from-passport-stamps-emails-photos): Practical guide to reconstructing a defensible timeline when your records are incomplete.

## Country Tax Residency Rules

Per-country explainers of the day-count test that can make you a tax resident, each with the counting window, how to calculate it, and a link to the official government source.

- [Tax Residency by Country (directory)](https://atlasdays.app/learn/tax-residency-by-country): Searchable hub listing every country's residency day threshold and counting window, with a comparison table and links to each explainer.

- [Portugal's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/portugal-183-day-tax-residency): More than 183 days in any rolling 12-month period, the overnight day rule, and the habitual-residence test.
- [Thailand's 180-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/thailand-180-day-tax-residency): More than 180 aggregate days in a calendar year, and what residency means for foreign income brought into Thailand.
- [Australia's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/australia-183-day-tax-residency): The 183-day test over the 1 July to 30 June income year, and the usual-place-of-abode exception.
- [Canada's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/canada-183-day-tax-residency): The 183-day sojourner (deemed resident) rule and the separate residential-ties (factual resident) test.
- [Colombia's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/colombia-183-day-tax-residency): More than 183 days in any rolling 365-day period, and the second-year residency clause.
- [Estonia's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/estonia-183-day-tax-residency): 183 days in any 12 consecutive calendar months, and the place-of-residence test.
- [Georgia's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/georgia-183-day-tax-residency): For the country of Georgia, 183 days in any continuous 12-month period ending in the tax year.
- [Greece's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/greece-183-day-tax-residency): More than 183 days in any 12-month period, backdated to the first day, plus centre of vital interests.
- [Ireland's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/ireland-183-day-tax-residency): The 183-day tax-year test and the 280-day two-year look-back test.
- [Malta's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/malta-183-day-tax-residency): More than 183 days in a calendar year, and how domicile and the remittance basis affect what is taxed.
- [Mauritius's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/mauritius-183-day-tax-residency): The 183-day income-year test and the separate 270-day three-year aggregate test.
- [New Zealand's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/new-zealand-183-day-tax-residency): More than 183 days in any 12-month period, backdated to the first day, plus the permanent-place-of-abode test.
- [Romania's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/romania-183-day-tax-residency): More than 183 days in any 12 consecutive months ending in the calendar year, plus domicile and centre of vital interests.
- [Singapore's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/singapore-183-day-tax-residency): Presence or employment of 183+ days in a calendar year, and the multi-year concessions.
- [UAE's 183-Day Tax Residency Rule](https://atlasdays.app/learn/uae-183-day-tax-residency): 183 days in any consecutive 12-month period, and the 90-day test for nationals and residents.

## US State Tax Residency

Per-state explainers of the day count that can make you a resident for state income tax, each with the threshold, the basis (a home plus days, a rebuttable presumption, or overnights), and the official state source.

- [US State Tax Residency (directory)](https://atlasdays.app/learn/us-state-tax-residency): Searchable hub listing every state's residency day threshold and basis, with a comparison table and links to each explainer.
- [Arizona Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/arizona-tax-residency): more than 270 days in a year; presumption basis.
- [California Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/california-tax-residency): more than 270 days in a year; presumption basis.
- [Colorado Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/colorado-tax-residency): more than 183 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [Connecticut Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/connecticut-tax-residency): more than 183 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [Georgia (US state) Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/georgia-us-tax-residency): at least 183 days in a year; rolling 12 months basis.
- [Hawaii Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/hawaii-tax-residency): more than 200 days in a year; presumption basis.
- [Idaho Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/idaho-tax-residency): more than 270 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [Maine Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/maine-tax-residency): more than 183 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [Maryland Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/maryland-tax-residency): at least 183 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [Massachusetts Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/massachusetts-tax-residency): more than 183 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [Minnesota Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/minnesota-tax-residency): at least 183 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [Nebraska Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/nebraska-tax-residency): at least 183 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [New Jersey Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/new-jersey-tax-residency): more than 183 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [New York Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/new-york-tax-residency): more than 183 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [North Dakota Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/north-dakota-tax-residency): more than 210 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [Ohio Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/ohio-tax-residency): more than 212 nights in a year; overnights basis.
- [Oregon Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/oregon-tax-residency): more than 200 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [Pennsylvania Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/pennsylvania-tax-residency): more than 183 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [Rhode Island Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/rhode-island-tax-residency): more than 183 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [Vermont Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/vermont-tax-residency): more than 183 days in a year; abode + days basis.
- [Virginia Tax Residency](https://atlasdays.app/learn/virginia-tax-residency): more than 183 days in a year; abode + days basis.

## Help

- [Getting Started with AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/help/getting-started): Initial setup, home-country choice, first trips, and first tracker.
- [Trackers and Limits](https://atlasdays.app/help/trackers-and-limits): How to choose and rely on rolling, per-stay, and calendar-year trackers.
- [Photo Import](https://atlasdays.app/help/photo-import): On-device photo and video metadata scanning, Full Photos access, review before saving, duplicates, overlaps, transit detection, photo references, and locked older trips.
- [CSV Import](https://atlasdays.app/help/csv-import): Import format, validation preview, duplicate handling, and AI-assisted mapping workflow.
- [Export and Reports](https://atlasdays.app/help/export-and-reports): CSV and PDF export, what each format contains, and how to clean up records before sharing.
- [Privacy, Location, and Sync](https://atlasdays.app/help/privacy-location-and-sync): On-device data handling, country detection, ignored countries, notifications, Photos access, and optional iCloud sync.
- [iCloud Sync and Restore](https://atlasdays.app/help/icloud-sync-and-restore): What sync covers, what stays local, and what to expect on a new device, after reinstalling, or while AtlasDays shows Restoring from iCloud.

## Optional

- [Support](https://atlasdays.app/support): Central support page for common questions about day counting, trackers, import/export, transit, and incomplete dates.
- [App Privacy](https://atlasdays.app/privacy): Product privacy details for on-device data, optional iCloud sync, and country-detection permissions.
- [What's New](https://atlasdays.app/changelog): Recent product changes and release notes.
